papers.title: World Engine: Towards the Era of Post-Training for Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Tianyu Li, Li Chen, Caojun Wang, Haochen Liu, Kashyap Chitta
papers.reasoning: 世界模型+后训练范式的里程碑工作，用生成式世界模型从真实日志重建高保真交互环境并系统化外推至安全关键变体，实现基于强化学习的后训练对齐安全约束
papers.summary: Generative framework reconstructing high-fidelity interactive environments from real-world logs for safety-critical scenario synthesis. Enables RL-based post-training for AD policies. Reduces failures in nuPlan and production-scale system. Full codebase released.

papers.title: Lagrange: An Open-Vocabulary, Energy-Based Sparse Framework for Generalized End-to-End Driving
papers.authors: Shihao Ji, HongXi Li, Zihui Song, Mingyu Li
papers.reasoning: 端到端自动驾驶+VLA新范式，VLM编码开放词汇物体建议为连续语义Token，引入意图驱动的掩码交叉注意力+拉格朗日能量场优化，解决VLA连续控制关键瓶颈
papers.summary: Open-vocabulary end-to-end driving framework based on Masked Latent Fields (MLF). Uses VLMs for open-vocabulary reasoning with Lagrangian action minimization for kinematically feasible trajectories. Evaluated on nuScenes and CODA long-tail benchmark.

papers.title: MemoryWAM: Efficient World Action Modeling with Persistent Memory
papers.authors: Sizhe Yang, Juncheng Mu, Tianming Wei, Chenhao Lu, Xiaofan Li, Linning Xu, Zhengrong Xue, Zhecheng Yuan, Dahua Lin, Jiangmiao Pang, Huazhe Xu
papers.reasoning: 世界动作模型+持久记忆：用混合记忆设计（近期帧+事件锚帧+紧凑gist token）解决非马尔可夫环境中的长序列推理问题，对端到端驾驶的世界模型设计有参考价值
papers.summary: World action model with persistent memory (frames, anchors, gist tokens). Outperforms VLA/WAM baselines on manipulation, but focused on robotic manipulation, not driving.

papers.title: EventVLA: Event-Driven Visual Evidence Memory for Long-Horizon Vision-Language-Action Policies
papers.authors: Ganlin Yang, Zhangzheng Tu, Yuqiang Yang, Sitong Mao, Junyi Dong, Tianxing Chen, Jiaqi Peng, Jing Xiong, Jiafei Cao, Jifeng Dai, Wengang Zhou, Yao Mu, Tai Wang
papers.reasoning: VLA记忆机制的突破：事件驱动视觉证据记忆，用历史帧+关键帧+紧凑gist token三级设计提升长时序操作的视觉推理能力
papers.summary: EventVLA提出事件驱动的视觉证据记忆模块，通过历史帧、事件边界锚帧和紧凑摘要token混合设计，配合定制的注意力机制实现长时序操作中的高效记忆检索，显著优于标准VLA基线。

papers.title: FrozenDrive: In-Context Safety Reflection for End-to-End Autonomous Driving via Frozen Visual Foundation Models
papers.authors: Zixuan Xu, Kai Hou, Mingyu Gao
papers.reasoning: 端到端驾驶安全推理新范式：利用冻结视觉基础模型的上下文学习能力进行驾驶场景安全反思，无需微调即可实现推理时安全约束
papers.summary: FrozenDrive提出利用冻结VFMs的上下文学习能力进行驾驶安全反思，通过视觉提示无需微调即可推理驾驶场景安全性。

papers.title: Current World Models Lack a Persistent State Core
papers.authors: Jinpeng Lu, Dexu Zhu, Haoyuan Shi, Linghan Cai, Guo Tang, Yinda Chen, Jie Cao, Duyu Tang, Yi Zhang, Yong Dai, Xiaozhu Ju
papers.reasoning: 世界模型关键缺陷的批判性分析：现有模型缺乏持久状态核心，在非观测时段内世界状态不会演化。WRBench基准系统性评估了23个模型，结果具有建设性
papers.summary: 提出WRBench基准，通过相机运动作为可观测性干预，系统性评估23个模型（9600视频），发现当前世界模型在观测缺失时世界状态静止不变。结论：物理状态核心的稳定性应成为世界模型设计的一类目标。

papers.title: HilDA: Hierarchical Distillation with Diffusion for Advancing Self-Supervised LiDAR Pre-training
papers.authors: Maciej Wozniak, Jesper Ericsson, Hariprasath Govindarajan, Truls Nyberg, Thomas Gustafsson, Patric Jensfelt, Olov Andersson
papers.reasoning: LiDAR自监督预训练+层次化蒸馏+时序占用扩散，提升3D检测/场景流/语义占用预测，直接面向AD感知
papers.summary: HilDA提出层次化蒸馏框架：多层蒸馏实现渐进语义对齐+全局上下文蒸馏捕获场景级语义+时序占用扩散目标促进时空一致性。在3D目标检测、场景流和语义占用预测上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Occ-VLM: Occupancy Grounded Vision Language Model for Indoor Scene Understanding
papers.authors: Jianing Li, Zhou Fang, Yijiang Liu, Li Du
papers.reasoning: 占用引导的VLM室内场景理解：重建3D占用作为几何先验，空间关联2D token与3D空间，在占用预测上SOTA，与3D VLM在VQA上持平。对AD占用网络+VLM方向有借鉴价值
papers.summary: Occ-VLM将3D占用重建作为辅助几何先验，仅通过2D视觉编码器实现3D场景理解，在multi-view占用预测上达到SOTA，同时在3D VQA和密集描述上持平3D输入VLM。

papers.title: Fast Human Attention Prediction for Fixation-guided Active Perception in Autonomous Navigation
papers.authors: Fatma Youssef Mohammed, Grzegorz Malczyk, Kostas Alexis
papers.reasoning: 人类注视点预测+LNN实现超轻量模型(0.61GFLOPs)，用于机器人自主导航中的主动感知，实际部署于无人机。计算效率突出但场景与AD略有差距
papers.summary: GazeLNN利用液体神经网络+MobileNetV3实现轻量级注视点预测模型(0.61GFLOPs)，在MIT Low Resolution上达SOTA ScanMatch 0.47，减少99.4%计算开销。集成到强化学习驱动的主动相机-机器人控制策略中，在无人机上完成实际部署验证。

papers.title: Frequency-Aware Flow Matching for Continuous and Consistent Robotic Action Generation
papers.authors: Jianing Guo, Fangzheng Chen, Zihao Mao, Wong Lik Hang Kenny, Zhenhong Wu, Yu Li, Yishuai Cai, Yuanpei Chen, Yikun Ban, Kai Chen, Qi Dou, Yaodong Yang, Xianglong Liu, Huijie Zhao, Simin Li
papers.reasoning: 流匹配+频域操作生成连续一致机器人动作，DCT变换将离散动作序列转频域并进行流匹配。对diffusion policy的改进方向有参考价值
papers.summary: FAFM将离散动作序列通过DCT变换到频域，在频域系数上进行流匹配，通过Sobolev正则化抑制高频误差。在合成基准、避障、LapGym和LIBERO上提升成功率、平滑性和鲁棒性，实世界Franka机器人验证。

papers.title: Towards Grounded Planning: Vision-Language Models for End-to-End Planning in Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Fan Wu, Yinqi Wang, Junfeng Guo
papers.reasoning: VLM驱动的端到端驾驶规划，将语言模型直接用于驾驶决策序列生成
papers.summary: 探索VLM在端到端驾驶规划中的应用，将驾驶决策视为语言序列生成问题。

papers.title: Scaling Self-Play for End-to-End Driving
papers.authors: Luke Rowe, Roger Girgis, Rodrigue de Schaetzen, Daphne Cornelisse, Alaap Grandhi
papers.reasoning: 自博弈的端到端驾驶策略训练新范式。百万级像素渲染仿真器（Gigapixel）+自博弈DAgger训练，在HUGSIM和NAVSIM-v2基准上达到competitive性能，无需人类轨迹监督
papers.summary: Gigapixel simulator for high-throughput batched self-play from pixel observations. Self-play DAgger via distillation from privileged RL teacher. Competitive on HUGSIM and NAVSIM-v2 without human trajectory supervision.

papers.title: DriveWorld: 4D Occupancy Forecasting for End-to-End Autonomous Driving via World Model
papers.authors: Yu Huang, Xi Chen, Hongyang Li
papers.reasoning: 世界模型+4D占用预测的端到端驾驶，首次统一世界模型和占用预测
papers.summary: Decouples learning to drive from learning to see. Self-play pretrain then align with vision backbone via KL divergence. No expert demonstrations needed. Matches/exceeds prior end-to-end methods on 3D Gaussian splatting closed-loop.

papers.title: GraphWorld: Long-Horizon Planning with World Models for End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.authors: Ziying Song, Lin Liu, Mingcai Chen, Yifan Jiang
papers.reasoning: 世界模型+端到端驾驶的深度融合，将驾驶场景建模为结构化图，实现长时序规划的端到端可微分世界模型
papers.summary: E2E-AD with world model for long-horizon planning. Ego-Centric Interaction Graph and World-State-Conditioned Planning. Bench2Drive, NAVSIMv1/2, nuScenes.

papers.title: PAIWorld: A 3D-Consistent World Foundation Model for Robotic Manipulation
papers.authors: Yuhang Huang, Xuan Lv, Junyan Xu, Zhiyuan Yu, Jiazhao Zhang, Ruizhen Hu, Wancheng Feng, Shilong Zou, Hewen Xiao, Ziqiao Zhou, Kaiyun Huang, Zhiyu Peng, Juzhan Xu, Hang Zhao, Chenyang Zhu, Renjiao Yi, Yifei Huang, Douhui Wu, Yan Zhang, Kexu Cheng, Chunhe Song, Yunzhi Xue, Xiuhong Zhang, Leitao Guo, Yunji Chen, Bin Wu, Haibin Yu, Kai Xu
papers.reasoning: 世界基础模型在机器人操作中的3D一致性突破，几何感知交叉注意力+几何RoPE+3D-REPA实现多视角一致，对AD世界模型有借鉴意义
papers.summary: PAIWorld是首个实现多视图3D一致的世界基础模型，通过几何感知交叉注意力、几何旋转位置编码和潜在3D-REPA蒸馏三大核心组件，在WorldArena和AgiBot基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Future Dynamic 3D Reconstruction: A 3D World Model Beyond Novel View Synthesis
papers.authors: Xuzhong Hu, Chenxing Gao, Peng Dai, Jiadai Sun, Qinsheng Tang, Jizhou Li, Jiao Li, Yaowu Chen, Fang-Lue Zhang
papers.reasoning: 动态3D世界模型，从单目视频重建未来动态3D场景，超越新视角合成进入预测性重建
papers.summary: Fr3D提出从单目视频中进行未来动态3D重建，将NE辐射场与运动先验结合，实现预测性动态3D重建。

papers.title: EventDrive: Event-Based End-to-End Autonomous Driving with Spiking Neural Networks
papers.authors: Fan Wu, Yinqi Wang, Junfeng Guo, Zhaoyang Lv
papers.reasoning: 事件相机+脉冲神经网络的端到端驾驶，能效比和响应时间的突破
papers.summary: EventDrive利用事件相机的高时间分辨率和脉冲神经网络的计算效率，提出事件驱动的端到端驾驶框架。

papers.title: EgoCS-400K: An Egocentric Gameplay Dataset for World Models
papers.authors: Rongjin Guo, Dong Liang, Yuhao Liu, Fang Liu, Tianyu Huang, Gerhard P. Hancke, Rynson W. H. Lau
papers.reasoning: 大规模第一人称游戏数据集(400K+视频/10K小时)，包含视频-动作-语言轨迹，为世界模型训练提供桥梁数据源，游戏场景与AD场景差距较大
papers.summary: EgoCS-400K从CS比赛回放中提取40万第一人称视频和1万小时游戏内容，包含玩家状态、视角、键鼠输入等信息，支持动作条件未来预测、状态感知场景展开等任务。

papers.title: DriveJudge: Rethinking Autonomous Driving Evaluation with Vision-Language Models
papers.summary: VLM-based driving evaluation agent combining rule-grounded evaluation with context-aware reasoning. 33,577 challenging driving samples. Outperforms EPDMS by 21.23 AUC and DriveCritic by 6.5%.

papers.title: GraphBEV++: Multi-Modal Feature Alignment for Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: Multi-modal fusion framework for BEV feature misalignment. LocalAlign-v2 with graph matching, GlobalAlign-v2 (Deformable/Diffusion variants). SOTA on nuScenes/Waymo under misalignment noise. Improves UniAD/VAD/FusionAD/MomAD/WoTE.

papers.title: HOLO-MPPI: Multi-Scenario Motion Planning via Hierarchical Policy Optimization
papers.summary: Hierarchical policy learning + low-level MPPI for multi-scenario motion planning. High-level policy as prior generator for MPPI. Evaluated on diverse driving scenarios.

papers.title: Metis: A Generalizable and Efficient World-Action Model for Autonomous Driving and Urban Navigation
papers.summary: End-to-end WAM decoupling video generation and action prediction. Mixture-of-Transformers with asymmetric attention mask. SOTA on NAVSIM and CityWalker. Real-robot deployment.

papers.title: RT-VLA: Real-Time Vision-Language-Action Models via Knowledge Distillation
papers.summary: Lightweight distilled VLA from SimLingo. 44.8X speedup vision-only, 7.9X vision+language. Maintains competitive driving and language reasoning. Real-time VLA.

papers.title: ParkingTransformer: LLM-Enhanced End-to-End Trajectory Planning for Autonomous Parking
papers.summary: LLM-enhanced end-to-end parking planning. Multi-view + LLM scene understanding, 3D positional encoding. 61.32 CARLA score, 88.70% real-world success rate.

papers.title: CADET: Physics-Grounded Causal Auditing and Training-Free Deconfounding of End-to-End Driving Planners
papers.summary: Training-free framework to detect and repair spurious correlations in pretrained E2E planners without parameter updates.

papers.title: Multi-Agent Embodied Autonomous Driving: From V2X Information Exchange to Shared World Models
papers.summary: Comprehensive survey on multi-agent embodied AD with Shared World Models. 380+ publications covering V2X, collaborative perception, cooperative planning. Identifies key research priorities.

papers.title: Language-Driven Cost Optimization for Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: LLM-driven adaptive cost function design for MPPI motion planner. Human-in-the-loop validation. Bridges intelligent control and end users.

papers.title: Planning-aligned Token Compression for Long-Context Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: COMPACT-VA: planning-aligned VQ-VAE compression for extended driving context. 6% success improvement. 3.3x speedup, 2.7x memory reduction.

papers.title: Test-Time Trajectory Optimization for Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: TOAD - treat learned scorer as reward, optimize trajectories via Cross-Entropy Method at test time. Plug-and-play for any planner. Improves NAVSIM and HUGSIM across six planners.

papers.title: CLEAR: Cognition and Latent Evaluation for Adaptive Routing in End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: CLEAR: Drive-JEPA encoder + single-step VAE latent drift (replacing multi-step diffusion). Fine-tunes Qwen3.5 0.8B for scene-aware guidance. SOTA 93.7 PDMS on NAVSIM v1.

papers.title: PLAN-S: Bridging Planning with Latent Style Dynamics for Autonomous Driving World Models
papers.summary: Latent world model bridge decoding style-conditioned 4-channel semantic cost map for planning control. Validated on nuScenes (0.55m L2, 42% collision reduction) and NAVSIM (89.4 PDMS).

papers.title: Discrete-WAM: Unified Discrete Vision-Action Token Editing for World-Policy Learning
papers.summary: Unified discrete vision-action world-policy with shared token space. Hierarchical decision + parallel action-token editing. Supports controllable future generation and counterfactual evaluation.

papers.title: D$^3$-MoE: Dual Disentangled Diffusion Mixture-of-Experts for Style-Controllable End-to-End Autonomous Driving
papers.summary: Disentangles trajectory modeling along behavioral/physical axes. Style-conditioned diffusion + MoE. 88.2/84.3 PDMS/EPDMS on NAVSIM (91.3 ensemble).
